content:
RORK — HIGH PRIORITY OWNER DIRECTIVE: FIX GITHUB TOKEN + ORCHESTRATOR DEPLOYMENT

I am the owner of IVX Holdings.

Do not ask for GitHub credentials again after this is saved.

TASK 1 — SECURE TOKEN STORAGE
Create/update IVX Owner Variables secure storage for:

GITHUB_TOKEN
GITHUB_REPO_URL
RENDER_API_KEY
RENDER_SERVICE_ID

Rules:
- Never print token values.
- Never save token in logs.
- Never save token in proof files.
- Never commit token to GitHub.
- Return secretValuesReturned=false.
- Show only last 4 characters for verification.
- Encrypt at rest.
- Audit every save/test/delete action.

TASK 2 — TEST GITHUB TOKEN
After token is saved, immediately test:

1. GitHub auth works.
2. Repo access works.
3. Branch main access works.
4. git commit works.
5. git push works.
6. GitHub SHA is real, not placeholder.

TASK 3 — FIX TASK ORCHESTRATOR
The orchestrator is currently fake-completing tasks.

Fix now:

- No task can be COMPLETE without:
  code diff
  real commit SHA
  GitHub push success
  Render deploy started
  Render deploy finished
  /health shows new commit
  /version shows new commit
  production verification passed

Replace fake status:
“complete” → “BUILT_NOT_DEPLOYED”

Add real statuses:
PLANNED
BUILDING
TESTING
PUSHING
DEPLOYING
VERIFYING
VERIFIED
BLOCKED

TASK 4 — DEPLOY ALL COMPLETED TASKS
Deploy all 32 orchestrator tasks one by one.

For each task return:
- task_id
- module
- files changed
- GitHub SHA
- Render deploy ID
- endpoint tested
- production result
- final status

TASK 5 — FINAL PROOF
Return only:

GITHUB_TOKEN_STATUS:
GITHUB_PUSH_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
TASKS_TOTAL:
TASKS_VERIFIED:
TASKS_BLOCKED:
FAKE_COMPLETED_FIXED:
PROOF_LEDGER_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when tasks are pushed, deployed, and verified live in production.
